metadata.note: Limited higher education in district. Most students pursue higher studies in Pokhara, Kathmandu or abroad

colleges.name: Mustang Multiple Campus
colleges.note: Offers +2 in Humanities and Management. No science stream. Affiliated to NEB.

colleges.name: Mustang Polytechnic Institute
colleges.note: CTEVT affiliated - Diploma in Hotel Management and Tourism. Practical training for Mustang tourism industry.
